title: Beehiiv vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
